data.title: Market Whales and Their Recent Bets on Procter & Gamble Options
What's Going On With Constellation Brands (STZ) Stock?
data.description: Shares of Constellation Brands fell 1.2% Friday. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy published an advisory on the cancer risks associated with alcohol consumption.

data.title: Bearish Analyst Regrets Not Upgrading Netflix To Buy In 2023
data.description: Harrigan maintained Netflix Inc with a Sell rating, but raised the price target from $555 to $720 due to strong execution and global scaling advantages.

data.title: Stock Of The Day: Is Advanced Micro Devices About To Break Down?
data.description: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) are testing support around $122. If this support breaks a new downtrend may form.
